title: Open question
description: A gap or ambiguity recorded for clarification rather than blocking. IDs follow the OQ- scheme.

question.description: The open question, phrased so it can be answered by a stakeholder.

context.description: Why this matters / what is blocked or uncertain without it.

blocking.description: True if downstream work cannot safely proceed until this is resolved.

source.description: Provenance: where the gap was detected (input section or derived stage).

owner.description: Who is expected to answer (role, stakeholder ID, or name).

status.description: Open questions move Open -> Answered (or Deferred). The shared lifecycle enum is reused; Resolved/Answered map to Implemented for derived views.

resolution.description: The answer once resolved. Set when status becomes Answered.

resolved_by.description: Reference to the decision/assumption/requirement that resolved this question.
